activeContinuationPrompt: Workflow Studio v1.2 is complete. Continue development from the package-based workflow using the Workspace Scanner, Workspace Intelligence, Dashboard Health, AI Context Engine, and Multi-Workspace foundation as completed systems.
currentMilestoneSummary: v1.2 Workspace Intelligence is complete. Workflow Studio can detect workspace structure, display workspace health, generate AI context foundations, and prepare for multiple managed workspaces.
architectureSummary: Workflow Studio uses a feature-based React architecture with services for business logic, shared TypeScript models, and Electron limited to native integration. Workspace intelligence is centralized through scanner and context services so UI features consume shared project understanding rather than duplicating detection logic.
recentlyCompletedWork: Updated v1.2 documentation and project metadata
nextRecommendedMilestone: Return to Orivex development using Workflow Studio as the project-management companion. Resume Workflow Studio later with v1.3 Workspace Polish and Persistence.
